accounting_caveat: `total_cohere_logical_api_calls` sums per-example `cohere_logical_api_calls` counters (reset each example); the global branching cap consumed can exceed this sum mid-trajectory. When cap errors appear, `logical_api_budget_cap_consumed_estimate` records the inferred global budget from the RuntimeError (authoritative enforcement), while the row-sum remains useful for comparative per-example cost.

planned_batches.notes: cap_proxy uses PR357 ratio logical_api_budget_cap_consumed_estimate / paired_examples_completed

cap_feasibility_floor_pairs.caveat: Proxy assumes constant per-pair cap consumption like PR357 global branching cap; row-sum alone understates consumed budget.
